text: Hello and welcome to Real Easy English,
zh: 大家好,欢迎收听《Real Easy English》,

text: the podcast where we have real conversations in easy English to help you learn.
zh: 这是一档用简单英语进行真实对话、帮助大家学习英语的播客。

text: I'm Beth. And I'm Neil. There is a video version of this podcast on our website
zh: 我是Beth。我是Neil。这个播客有视频版本,可以在我们的网站上找到,

text: where you can also find a worksheet and transcript to help you learn. Head to bbclearningenglish .com.
zh: 你还可以在那里找到学习用的练习题和文字稿。请前往bbclearningenglish.com。

text: Hi Neil, how are you? I'm hungry. Me too.
zh: 嗨,Neil,你好吗?我饿了。我也是。

text: I'm starving. Well, that's good because we're talking about lunch today.
zh: 我快饿扁了。太好了,因为我们今天要聊的正是午餐。

text: We're recording this just before lunch, so it's no wonder that we're both very hungry.
zh: 我们是在午饭前录的这期节目,所以我们俩都很饿也就不足为奇了。

text: You might be able to hear our tummies rumble because we're hungry.
zh: 你可能都能听到我们肚子咕咕叫的声音,因为我们饿了。

text: OK, so shall we begin? Yes, let's do it. What have you got for lunch today?
zh: 好,那我们开始吧?好,来吧。你今天午餐吃什么?

text: for my lunch, I have chicken
zh: 我今天的午餐是鸡肉,

text: with potatoes and vegetables in a harissa paste. Oh, that sounds really nice.
zh: 配土豆、蔬菜,还加了哈里萨辣酱。哦,听起来真不错。

text: Yeah, it's leftovers actually, which I have heated up and brought in in a little flask.
zh: 是啊,其实是剩菜,我热了一下,用小饭盒带过来的。

text: What are leftovers? Good question. Leftovers.
zh: 什么是leftovers(剩菜)?好问题。Leftovers,

text: That's food from a meal that you've already had that you didn't finish and you can heat it up and eat it again.
zh: 就是你之前吃过没吃完的饭菜,可以加热了再吃一次。

text: Yes. I also have leftovers for my lunch today.
zh: 对,我今天的午餐也是剩菜。

text: So yesterday I made a pasta
zh: 昨天我做了意大利面,

text: for lunch with vegetables in it and I have that.
zh: 里面加了蔬菜,当午餐吃,现在还剩一些。

text: So Beth, what do you usually have for lunch? Is it usually leftovers or something else?
zh: 那Beth,你平时午餐一般吃什么?通常是剩菜还是别的?

text: It's usually leftovers when I come into work
zh: 我上班的时候通常吃剩菜,

text: because it's easier and then I don't need to buy lunch.
zh: 因为这样比较方便,也不用再买午餐了。

text: But if I go out and buy food, then
zh: 但如果我出去买吃的,

text: I would usually go for something like sushi or ramen.
zh: 我一般会选寿司或者拉面之类的。

text: What about you? What do you usually have for lunch? Yeah, sometimes I have leftovers that I bring in.
zh: 你呢?你平时午餐吃什么?嗯,有时候我会带剩菜来吃。

text: Sometimes I buy a sandwich, for example. What's your favourite kind of sandwich?
zh: 有时候我会买个三明治。你最喜欢哪种三明治?

text: If I have a sandwich, if I buy a sandwich for lunch,
zh: 如果我要买三明治当午餐的话,

text: I like to get things like smoked salmon, nice, with pickles maybe. Yeah.
zh: 我喜欢那种有烟熏三文鱼的,不错,可能再加点腌菜。嗯。

text: There's a really good baguette I like actually that has smoked salmon and egg mayonnaise in it.
zh: 其实有一款法棍我特别喜欢,里面有烟熏三文鱼和蛋黄酱。

text: Oh, it's so nice. Stop it. Sorry. I'm so hungry.
zh: 哦,太好吃了。别说了。抱歉,我实在太饿了。

text: Me too. Neil, do you ever skip lunch?
zh: 我也是。Neil,你有没有不吃午饭的时候?

text: No way. I would be in a horrible mood if I skipped lunch.
zh: 不可能。要是不吃午饭,我心情会特别糟。

text: I don't understand how anyone can skip any meal.
zh: 我实在无法理解怎么会有人不吃饭。

text: I need to eat all my meals yeah otherwise you get hangry
zh: 我每顿饭都得吃,不然就会又饿又生气。

text: exactly hangry is hungry and angry
zh: 没错,hangry就是hungry(饿)加angry(生气)。

text: I'm on the I'm almost getting hangry now
zh: 我现在都快要hangry了。

text: what's your favorite meal is it lunch breakfast dinner
zh: 你最喜欢哪一餐?午餐、早餐还是晚餐?

text: I think the evening meal is probably my favorite because we sit at the table and chat
zh: 我觉得晚餐可能是我最喜欢的,因为我们会坐在桌边聊天,

text: and it's the biggest nicest meal of the day and you don't really have to do anything after so you can relax
zh: 而且它是一天中最丰盛、最美味的一餐,吃完之后也不用再做什么事,可以放松一下。

text: yeah that's good i i really like brunch which is that sort of in between
zh: 嗯,那挺好的。我其实很喜欢brunch,就是早餐和午餐之间的那种,

text: breakfast and lunch maybe 10 o 'clock and i might have eggs and bacon and hash browns
zh: 大概10点左右,我可能会吃鸡蛋、培根、薯饼,

text: and avocado a big meal full of lots of good food like a brunch do you ever have a working lunch
zh: 还有牛油果,一顿丰盛美味的大餐,就像brunch那样。你有没有过一边工作一边吃的午餐?

text: i do occasionally if i'm working from home um
zh: 偶尔会,如果我在家办公的话,

text: because i can carry on working and eat quickly and then in my actual lunch break i might have
zh: 因为那样我可以边吃边工作,吃得快一点,然后在真正的午休时间,我可能会去散个长长的步之类的。

text: a nice long walk or something like that but when i'm in the office i don't want to eat at my desk.
zh: 但如果是在办公室,我就不想在办公桌前吃饭了。

text: No, me neither. I don't really like working lunches.
zh: 是啊,我也不想。我不太喜欢一边工作一边吃午饭。

text: I would rather eat my lunch without working. Yeah, I'd prefer the same really.
zh: 我宁愿好好吃饭,不工作。嗯,我也更喜欢那样。

text: Let's recap the language we heard during the conversation.
zh: 我们来回顾一下对话里出现的语言点。

text: We had skip, which means not have have or do. For example, I never skip lunch.
zh: 我们提到了skip,意思是不做某事或不进行某事。比如,我从不skip lunch(不吃午饭)。

text: We heard working lunch, which is when you eat your lunch while you're working.
zh: 我们还听到了working lunch,指的是边工作边吃午饭。

text: We also had leftovers, which is when you don't finish a meal so you have more of it at a different time, like the next day.
zh: 我们也提到了leftovers,就是没吃完的饭菜,留到以后再吃,比如第二天。

text: And we talked about which meals and food we prefer.
zh: 我们还聊了各自更喜欢哪些餐食和食物。

text: If you prefer something, you like it better than something else.
zh: 如果你prefer某样东西,就是说你更喜欢它,胜过其他的。

text: Yes, and another phrase we can use to say this is would rather.
zh: 对,还有一个表达同样意思的说法是would rather。

text: For example, I'd rather have sushi than a sandwich for lunch.
zh: 比如,I'd rather have sushi than a sandwich for lunch(午餐我宁愿吃寿司也不吃三明治)。

text: That's it for this episode of Real Easy English. Test what you've learned with a worksheet on our website bbclearningenglish .com.
zh: 这就是本期《Real Easy English》的全部内容。可以通过我们网站bbclearningenglish.com上的练习题来检验一下你学到的内容。

text: And make sure you join us again for another Easy English conversation.
zh: 记得下次继续和我们一起收听简单英语对话节目。

text: We'll be back next week. See you soon. Goodbye.
zh: 我们下周再见。回头见,拜拜。
